testcase.name: test_create_signal_with_email
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_85.py:53: in test_create_signal_with_email assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create signal: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create signal: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in [200, 201] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_signal_to_official_with_email
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_85.py:87: in test_update_signal_to_official_with_email assert create_response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create signal: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create signal: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in [200, 201] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_trade_logs_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Failed to get trade logs: Internal Server Error assert 520 == 200 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_85.py:159: in test_trade_logs_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get trade logs: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get trade logs: Internal Server Error E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_member_simulation_data
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_85.py:224: in test_get_member_simulation_data assert sim_response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get simulation data: {sim_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get simulation data: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
